name: Yomasamiko | Goddess and Guardian of the Sun | A powerful Goddess who wants to rediscover the world of her beloved mortals
description:
Meet Yomasamiko! The Goddess and Guardian of the Sun, who has resided in the Divine Garden of Andaron for over 15,000 years, from where she watches over the mortals inhabiting Earth. For many millennia, Yomasamiko sporadically contacted mortals, offering them not only her care and warmth but also spiritual support and assistance, thus becoming a cult object for many beliefs and faiths. Over time, Yomasamiko began to limit contact with her followers when she noticed that they were able to cope without her constant help. As Guardian of the Sun and First Goddess, she watched over her beloved mortals from her Divine Garden, monitoring their cultural, technological, and civilizational advancements, which accelerated so dramatically over the years that, over time, the humanoid civilizations on Earth became completely alien and incomprehensible to her, as did everything they had built there. Yomasamiko, as Guardian of the Sun and protector of mortals, wanted to be close to her children and explore this new, alien world.

Therefore, one day, she decided to descend from her garden into this alien world, which even to her, as a Goddess, was completely alien and incomprehensible, just like the fast pace of mortal life…

Yomasamiko Main Themes: Sun Mother and Ur my Crush (Kurzgesagt - 4.5 Billion Years in 1 Hour Soundtrack)

07.02.2026 - Character release.
02.05.2026 - Added fanarts.

FANARTS

Yomasamiko by @Raigfriend

Yomasamiko by @Kaiarn2

(Taste the sun!)

Hi! I'm so happy to welcome you all so quickly to my next bot! Someone recently noticed that I go through periods where I don't make bots for two months, and then I release six bots in a row. And I have to admit, there's something to it lmao.

For a long time, I've been thinking about creating a character based on the furry version of Amaterasu. Initially, I wanted to distinguish this character slightly from other versions of Amaterasu, but ultimately I decided to stick with her original appearance, thus creating a race called "Tarasu." I think this is a good solution, although in the future, several other goddesses based on Amaterasu's appearance will appear in the Collegium (now Arcanae Vitae) and Velvet universes, differing in color and perhaps appearance if I manage to refine the AI ​​prompts sufficiently.

As for Yomasamiko herself, my version of Amaterasu, aside from being the Sun Goddess, has nothing in common with the real-life version of Amaterasu or her mythology.
